pd-prep-for-pgdp

Distributed Proofreaders prep pipeline. Each card opens a canvas. Double-click anywhere on a card, or use the Open button.

↑ project root

Templates & landing pages

CONTENT SLOT

App shell

template

Header + breadcrumb + content slot. Every screen drops into this.

final/template/

Projects

page

Recent activity · Attributes · Manage. The landing page.

final/projects/

Pipeline

template

Per-stage tab slot + Project-settings destination. Locked.

final/pipeline/

Pipeline stages

4 / 23 wired
Source group 3 / 5 wired
01 wired
Source
Thumbnails · selection · inserts · reorder
final/source/ · 10 boards
02 wired
Grayscale
Color → grayscale · perceptual or standard
ref wf11 · final/grayscale/ · 9 boards
03 wired
Crop
Bbox per page · review flagged
ref wf10 · final/crop/ · 10 boards
04 placeholder
Dewarp
Page curvature removal
prompt ready · dewarp-stage.md
05 placeholder
Deskew
Rotate to true rectangle
—
Image group 0 / 3 wired
06 placeholder
Threshold
Grayscale → bilevel
—
07 placeholder
Denoise
Speckle + ink-bleed cleanup
—
08 placeholder
Canvas map
Per-page canvas fit + margins
—
OCR group 0 / 5 wired
09 placeholder
Text zones
Block / paragraph / line / word
—
10 placeholder
OCR
Recognize glyphs → tokens
—
11 placeholder
Page order
Auto-detect scans out of sequence · uses OCR page numbers
ref wf09 · ReorderScansStage
12 placeholder
Spellcheck
Token confidence pass
—
13 placeholder
Text review
Human review queue + comments
ref wf05b · scannos
Pack group 1 / 10 wired
14 placeholder
Illustrations
Detect + extract illustrations
—
15 wired
Hyphen join
Resolve end-of-line hyphens
ref wf05 · final/hyphen_join/ · 7 boards
16 placeholder
Regex pass
Project-scoped find/replace
—
17 placeholder
Page split
Single-page → spread cut
—
18 placeholder
Proof pack
Bundle pages + text for PGDP
—
19 placeholder
Validation
Pre-flight check · 8 rules
ref wf02
20 placeholder
Zip
Deterministic archive build
—
21 placeholder
Build package
Manifest + pre-flight
—
22 placeholder
Submit check
Dry-run PGDP submission
—
23 placeholder
Archive
Long-term storage handoff
—

Wireframe explorations

drafts · reference only

wf01 · Folder upload

pre-pipeline

Universal droplet + IA URL detection · right-hand review sheet.

wf01/ · direction F

wf02 · Package validation

stage 19

Pre-flight check gating Download. PASS · WARNINGS · ERRORS.

wf02/ → validation

wf03 · Source quality flags

cross-cutting

Stage-aware flag taxonomy + filter chips. Source · threshold · ocr.

wf03/ · taxonomy ref

wf05 · Hyphen-join workbench

stage 15

Per-book report + global library. Auto-joined / undecided / mismatched.

wf05/ → hyphen_join

wf05b · Scannos workbench

post-spellcheck

Capture · Promote · Configure. Suspicion sidecar in Page Workbench.

wf05b/ → text_review

wf09 · Page reorder

→ source + stage 11

Manual drag → Source/Pages. Auto-detect → stage 11 Page order (after OCR).

wf09/ · split across two destinations

wf10 · Batch crop review

→ crop

Density toggle · multi-select · sticky bulk bar. Now in Crop stage.

wf10/ → wired into crop

wf11 · Perceptual grayscale

→ grayscale

Mode-chooser studies. Now in Grayscale stage.

wf11/ → wired into grayscale

wf-pw · Page Workbench

cross-cutting

3-column page deep-dive. Stage controls · viewer · context drawer.

wf-pw/ · per-page UI

↓ scroll · double-click to open · ↗ button opens in same tab
